title: sandbox-template-missing-retry-storm
description:
This is a continuation of sandbox-template-missing-retry-storm. Since 2026-05-29T18:59:17Z, dev runs across stories 34-45 have continued failing immediately with the same factory-side sandbox error: `sandbox run raised: TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`. The failures are short (~0.2s), have zero tokens and zero cost per run, and are repeating in tight per-story retry sequences, which indicates the stories are not reaching model execution and are blocked at sandbox setup or templating time.

The pattern has broadened in this window. The flagged watcher note reports 60 dev failures across 10 affected stories, with retry storms on each `(story, dev)` pair. Underlying run records corroborate the same error text across multiple stories and attempts, while git activity continued creating worktrees and pushing commits for the same sequence of stories. That means the factory is still advancing surrounding workflow activity while dev execution for these stories is non-productive, increasing blocked-story surface area even though direct token spend from the failing runs is zero.

A separate manager_watcher placeholder leak also recurred in the same window per the watcher note, but the strongest coherent signal in the bundled raw events is the sustained sandbox template failure. Given the repeated, clearly diagnosable infrastructure error, the widening story coverage, and the prior warn-level concern on this same pattern, this now meets halt-level urgency as a sustained factory-internal failure mode.

evidence.summary_excerpt: The factory continued the already-escalated sandbox failure pattern: dev runs for stories 34-45 failed immediately and repeatedly with the same diagnosable error `TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`.

evidence.excerpt: {"noteworthy":"Factory-side diagnosable failures continued: 60 dev run failures across stories 34-45 all ended immediately with `sandbox run raised: TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`."}
{"noteworthy":"There are retry storms on every affected story: 10 separate (story, dev) groups, each with 6 failures in this short window."}
story 34 dev attempt 3 failed in 0.216s with `sandbox run raised: TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`; tokens_in=0 tokens_out=0 cost_usd=0.0
story 38 dev attempt 1 failed in 0.235s with `sandbox run raised: TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`; tokens_in=0 tokens_out=0 cost_usd=0.0
story 45 dev attempt 1 failed in 0.211s with `sandbox run raised: TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`; tokens_in=0 tokens_out=0 cost_usd=0.0
{"noteworthy":"The long-standing missing-DB worktree set remains and has grown to include stories 72-82; story 33 is still present in a blocked state."}
{"noteworthy":"A high-severity placeholder leak recurred in a manager_watcher prompt at 18:59:17Z."}

escalation_reason: Sustained factory-internal sandbox template failure (`TemplateNotFound('self_documentation.j2')`) is continuing from the prior concern and has broadened in this window to 60 immediate dev failures across stories 34-45, with retry storms on 10 story/persona pairs. L3 judgment is needed because this is a clear infrastructure-side failure mode affecting multiple stories and continuing to create blocked work without reaching model execution.
